chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: In today's video, we will talk about functions.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: What are functions?

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: Sometimes we want to use our code,

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: the logic of the code, multiple times.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: Let's say we want to print from 1 to 15 times in our program.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: And let's say the code to do this is of 10 lines.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: So we don't want to repeat these 10 lines in our program.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: There are two reasons for this.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: If we repeat these lines,

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: so let's say I want to change the code in these lines,

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: then I will have to repeat it where the 15 places where this program is being used.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: I have to repeat these lines where they are being used.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: I will have to make a mistake if I want to correct it in my program.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: Along with that, it will be very hectic for me.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: My number of lines will increase.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: If I separate this particular logic from my main program

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: and make it a separate entity,

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: then it will be easy for me to update it.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: And I will be able to use it 10 times

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: without increasing my number of lines.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: So how will I do this?

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: I will do it with the help of functions.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: That is, I will separate the logic and make it a function.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: I will say, there is a function to add.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: There is a function to get the average.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: There is a function to get the geometric mean.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: Sometimes the logic of functions is very complicated.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
chunks.text: For example, it can be a function to get the multiplication table of a given number.

chunks.title: Functions in Python
